# cloudflare_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile" "example_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile" {
  account_id = "699d98642c564d2e855e9661899b7252"
  contents = "function FindProxyForURL(url, host) { return \"DIRECT\"; }"
  name = "Devops team"
  description = "PAC file for Devops team"
  slug = "pac_devops"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `contents` (String) Actual contents of the PAC file
- `name` (String) Name of the PAC file.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Detailed description of the PAC file.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly version of the PAC file name. If not provided, it will be auto-generated

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String) Unique URL to download the PAC file.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_zero_trust_gateway_pacfile.example '<account_id>/<pacfile_id>'
```
